server.title: Server

regions.title: Regional servers
regions.description: Switcher button labels and server URLs for the site header

regions.intro: The current server is always listed first: URL comes from the domain on the VDS page (/vds); you can change the button label. Add more servers with «Add server».
regions.primaryLabelHint: Button label for the current server in the header.
regions.primaryUrlHint: URL is taken from the domain set on the VDS page. If no domain is set, the current address is used (e.g. localhost:9000).
regions.empty: No servers added yet. Click «Add server».
regions.buttonLabelHint: This label will appear on the header button.
regions.adminOnly: Server settings are available to administrators only.

ai.adminOnly: AI settings are available to administrators only.

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.label: OpenAI API Key
openai.providerDescription: Enter your OpenAI API Key and (optionally) Base URL for custom endpoints.

ollama.title: Ollama
ollama.label: Ollama (local models)
ollama.providerDescription: Configure Ollama for local open-source models. No API key required.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Telegram bot integration for notifications and authentication.
telegram.confirmClear: Warning! This will permanently delete all Telegram settings from the database. Continue?

email.title: Email
email.description: Email integration for sending messages and notifications.
email.confirmClear: Warning! This will permanently delete all Email settings from the database. Continue?

database.title: Database
database.description: PostgreSQL integration for application data storage and settings management.
database.confirmRotate: Generate a new encryption key? All encrypted data will be safely re-encrypted with the new key.

assistant.title: AI assistant
assistant.description: Assistant behavior, language, model, and rule settings.
assistant.ollamaInfraDesc: Ollama server connection settings. Used as defaults for all Ollama operations unless a specific model is set in AI assistant settings below.
assistant.ollamaBaseUrlHelp: Base URL for the Ollama API
assistant.llmModelDefaultHelp: Default LLM model name (used if no model is selected below)
assistant.embeddingModelDefaultHelp: Default embedding model name (used if no model is selected below)
assistant.vectorSearchUrlHelp: URL for the vector search service
assistant.modelSelectionDesc: Select a specific model from available providers. If none is selected, the default Ollama model from settings above will be used.
assistant.ragThresholdHelp: Minimum distance to include a result (lower = stricter)
assistant.topKHelp: Number of top tokens to sample from
assistant.formatHelp: For normal chat leave Auto. JSON breaks user-facing replies; structured JSON is only for internal tasks (name extraction, broadcast).
assistant.channelUpdateError: Failed to update assistant status for channel {channel}. Check logs.

anthropic.label: Anthropic API Key
anthropic.description: Enter your Anthropic API Key and (optionally) Base URL.

google.label: Google Gemini API Key
google.description: Enter your Google Gemini API Key and (optionally) Base URL.

security.rpcAdminOnly: Detailed RPC provider settings are available to administrators only.
security.loadFailed: Failed to load settings from server. Default values loaded.
security.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving settings. Check the developer console.
security.rpcExists: Error: RPC configuration for network ID '{networkId}' already exists.
security.tokenExists: Error: Token with address '{address}' already added.
security.fillTokenFields: Please fill in the token name and address.

rpc.title: RPC Providers
rpc.chainIdHelp: Chain ID is the unique blockchain network identifier (integer)
rpc.testRequiresBoth: Both network ID and URL are required to test RPC

authTokens.title: Authentication tokens
authTokens.name: Name:
authTokens.minBalanceHelp: Minimum token balance required for access
authTokens.readonlyThresholdHelp: Number of tokens required for read-only permissions
authTokens.editorThresholdHelp: Number of tokens required for edit and delete permissions
authTokens.thresholdInvalid: Read-Only token minimum must be less than Editor token minimum
authTokens.accessReadonly: You can view data but cannot edit or delete
authTokens.accessEditor: You can view, edit, and delete data

websshTunnel.redirecting: Redirecting to VDS management page in 3 seconds...
